title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at CL Educate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
